title: senecio spartioides var. riddellii
intro: Senecio spartioides var. riddellii, also known as Riddell's Jacob's Ladder, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio spartioides var. riddellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat conditions such as fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
